title: AMEC Measurement Month 2024: P+ Measurement Services at the Forefront of Global PR Insights - FinancialEDGE
description: In collaboration with the International Association for the Measurement and Evaluation of Communication (AMEC), Nigeria's leading media intelligence agency, P+ Measurement Services, is proud to host the 2024 edition of the annual AMEC Measurement Month (#AMECMM). This highly anticipated virtual event will take place on November 29, 2024, from 12 p.m. to 2 p.m. (WAT) via the
html: In collaboration with the International Association for the Measurement and Evaluation of Communication (AMEC), Nigeria’s leading media intelligence agency, P+ Measurement Services, is proud to host the 2024 edition of the annual AMEC Measurement Month (#AMECMM).
